  "findings": [
    "Missing perimeter equipotential bonding grid around the pool/spa area."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a continuous 8 AWG bare copper conductor or structural grid 18 to 24 inches from the inside walls of the pool, 4 to 6 inches below subgrade, and bond it to the pool structure and equipment."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 680.26(B)(2) requires a perimeter bonding system extending 3 feet horizontally beyond the inside walls of the pool. The absence of this perimeter bond grid creates a severe shock hazard due to potential voltage gradients in the pool deck area.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Section 680.26(B)(2)"
  ]
}
